---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? What friction does it remove?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like and how it would work.

## Alternatives Considered

Are there other ways this could be solved?

## Roadmap Reference

Does this relate to anything in [ROADMAP.md](../../ROADMAP.md)?
- [ ] Sprint 2 item
- [ ] Sprint 3 item
- [ ] New idea

## Additional Context

Mockups, references, or related issues.
